finding_title: Stale borrower collateral silo assignment corrupts solvency configuration for debt recipients
summary: Silo Enterprise continuous audit 报告中，借款人还清一侧债务后，borrowerCollateralSilo 未被重置；之后通过 debt-share transfer 接收另一侧债务时，solvency 配置仍解析到旧 collateral silo，使同资产抵押/债务按 1:1 假设估值。K2 应重点映射到 aToken/debt token transfer、position owner 转移、reserve id/bitmap/cache 未刷新。
root_cause: recipient debt-transfer logic reuses a stale collateral-side assignment instead of recomputing the recipient's solvency configuration for the transferred debt silo
broken_invariants: a borrower's solvency configuration must be derived from live debt and collateral positions after every debt-share transfer
repaying one position must not leave stale collateral-side state that authorizes a later incompatible debt position
attack_preconditions: 债务份额可转让或存在等价 position transfer 路径
账户在一个市场清债后仍保留旧 collateral-side/cache 状态
attacker_capability: user able to repay, receive transferred debt shares, and arrange collateral/debt side ordering
trigger_actions: fully repay debt in one silo while stale collateral assignment remains
receive debt shares from the opposite silo
invoke solvency/withdraw/borrow path that consumes stale configuration

impact.description: account can be valued under the wrong collateral/debt relationship, allowing unsafe borrowing or bad debt

why_not_higher: 报告定级 Medium；实际升级需要证明可稳定提取资金或制造不可回收坏账。
why_not_lower: 破坏借贷协议核心 solvency 配置，且通过普通用户转账/还款顺序触发。
common_false_positive_angles: 若当前实现禁止 debt token transfer 或每次 transfer 后全量重算 account data，则不成立
只存在 view cache 错误但所有安全写路径重新读取权威状态时应降级
mitigations: 在 debt transfer/repay/position migration 后强制重算或清空 borrower collateral assignment；安全路径不要消费陈旧 cache。

snippets.note: PDF: stale borrowerCollateralSilo/debt recipients two-way markets Medium finding
